evals.name: no-args-navigation-menu
evals.expected_output: Outputs theory.md section 0 quick card content plus three-tier navigation menu (entry/deep/reference). Does NOT dump full theory content.

assertions.text: Reads knowledge/theory.md section 0 only
Outputs quick card summary content from theory.md
Navigation menu shows three tiers: entry, deep, reference
Entry tier lists model and why subcommands
Does NOT output full theory.md content
Default output is concise, 3 lines or less for navigation

evals.name: specific-topic-model
evals.expected_output: Outputs summary of theory.md section 2 (concept model) with 1-2 sentence overview, core table (5-8 rows), and navigation recommendation to related topics.

assertions.text: Reads theory.md section 2 specifically
Output starts with 1-2 sentence summary of concept model
Core table or list extracted from section with 5-8 rows
Navigation recommendation at end suggests objects or trace
Does NOT dump section 2 raw text verbatim
Only loads theory-procedures-default.md, no other procedures

evals.name: why-subcommand-with-project
evals.expected_output: Three-layer output: recent behaviors from state.md/CR events, design rationale mapped to theory.md section 11 decisions, theory excerpts. Navigation to /pace-trace.

assertions.text: Reads state.md for current work state and recent behaviors
Reads recent CR event tables for recent actions
Output has 'Recent Behaviors' section listing system actions
Output has 'Design Rationale' table mapping behaviors to section 11 decisions
Theory excerpt included, 3 lines or less
Navigation at end suggests /pace-trace for specific decision details
Loads theory-procedures-why.md, NOT theory-procedures-default.md

evals.name: why-specific-keyword
evals.expected_output: Precise explanation of why devpace uses gate mechanism, mapped to theory.md section 11 decisions #2 and #14. Does NOT list all behaviors.

assertions.text: Matches 'gate' keyword to decisions #2 and #14 from mapping table
Outputs detailed explanation for gate mechanism design rationale
References theory.md section 11 specific decision numbers
Does NOT output full behavior list (precise query mode)
Navigation suggests /pace-trace for specific gate decisions

evals.name: keyword-search-with-results
evals.expected_output: Searches theory.md for keyword, returns matching paragraphs with context, section location indicator, and related subcommand recommendations.

assertions.text: Uses Grep to search in knowledge/theory.md
Returns matching paragraphs with surrounding context (3 lines)
Each result has location indicator showing section name and number
Related subcommand recommendations included based on keyword mapping
Loads theory-procedures-search.md for search rules
Uses natural language descriptions, no internal IDs exposed

evals.name: keyword-search-no-results
evals.expected_output: No matches found for 'kubernetes', outputs friendly message with 2-3 recommended closest subcommands.

assertions.text: Reports no match found for 'kubernetes'
Suggests 2-3 closest relevant subcommands as alternatives
No error or crash on zero results
Tone is helpful, not dismissive

evals.name: role-adaptation-biz
evals.expected_output: Outputs trace theory with role adaptation for biz role: framing from business perspective (value chain, MoS, business goals mapping) instead of default dev framing.

assertions.text: Reads state.md preferred-role field and detects biz role
Theory content unchanged (trace/value chain theory)
Project association section uses business framing: value chain, MoS, business goals
Includes role adaptation hint mentioning current biz perspective
Mentions /pace-role for switching role perspective
Navigation recommendation suggests loops or mapping as next

evals.name: uninitialized-project
evals.expected_output: Outputs objects theory from theory.md section 3, but without project association (no .devpace/). Ends with /pace-init guidance.

assertions.text: Reads theory.md section 3 for objects content
Outputs theory summary with core table
No project association section (no .devpace/ to read from)
Ends with guidance to try /pace-init for project-specific mapping
No error or crash when .devpace/ is missing
Navigation recommendation still provided for related topics
